LAW AND MOTION 302, RE: PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, AGAINST DEFENDANT IRVING ZARETSKY. THE COURT AND DEFENDANT IRVING ZARENSKY DISCUSS THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. PURSUANT TO THE COURT, PLAINTIFF'S SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION IS MOOT; THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS ON JUN-14-2023. IN ANY EVENT, DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION WAS UNTIMELY FILED ONE COURT DAY BEFORE THE HEARING AND HE FAILED TO FILE A RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFF'S SEPARATE STATEMENT OF UNDISPUTED MATERIAL FACTS. AFTER ADDITIONAL DISCUSSION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTION IS MOOT; THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS ON JUN-14-2023 - SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR THIS DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Maria Evangelista; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:25 am and concluding at 9:34 am.

Plainriff Philadelphia Indemnity Insurance Company is represented by Rosa Martinez-Genzon, Esq. via Zoom video conference.
Defendant Irving Zaretsky is not present.

Plaintiff presents offer of proof and a summary of the facts as set forth on the record.

fter hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Philadelphia Indemnity Insurance Company as follows:

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $296,713.09

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, Against Defendant Irving Zaretsky
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or in The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, Against Defendant Irving Zaretsky.

Appearances (via Zoom):

Irving Zarensky, in propria persona, Defendant.

No other appearances.

The court and Mr. Zarensky discuss the court's tentative ruling. Pursuant to the court, Plaintiff's summary judgment motion is moot; the court granted plaintiff's motion for terminating sanctions on Jun-14-2023. In any event, defendant's opposition to the summary judgment motion was untimely filed one court day before the hearing and he failed to file a response to plaintiff's separate statement of undisputed material facts. After additional discussion, the court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff's unopposed summary judgment motion is moot; the court granted plaintiff's motion for terminating sanctions on Jun14-2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)
